notes:
All CRITICAL and HIGH checks pass. One LOW schema finding noted (non-blocking).

CRITICAL — PASS — Scope: git diff HEAD --name-only shows .claude/swarm/state.json (orchestrator bookkeeping, not a worker edit), src/renderer/game/systems/ai/MCPAIAdapter.js, and vite.config.js. The two source files match the receipt's files_changed exactly. The spec listed MCPAIAdapter.js at src/renderer/services/MCPAIAdapter.js (non-existent path); worker correctly applied the fix to the real path and documented the discrepancy.

CRITICAL — PASS — JS only: no TypeScript files introduced. Config file remains .js, edit is pure JS.

CRITICAL — PASS — Vite config scope: only build.rollupOptions.output.manualChunks was added. All existing options (plugins, base, optimizeDeps, build.outDir, build.emptyOutDir, server.*, resolve.*) are intact and unmodified.

CRITICAL — PASS — Chunk ordering: @react-three/rapier checked first (line 18), then @react-three/drei (line 19), then @react-three/fiber (line 20), then three (line 21). drei is correctly ordered before three, satisfying the spec's ordering requirement. rapier resolves to vendor-rapier before reaching the three branch.

CRITICAL — PASS — MCPAIAdapter.js change: exactly one dynamic import line removed from the call site (line -181) and one static import added at the top (line +30). No other edits in the file.

HIGH — PASS — Static importer verification: receipt notes confirm 3 static importers (aiFallbacks.js, aiPromptBuilders.js, physicsEducationSystem.js) exist before conversion. Conversion was correctly applied.

HIGH — PASS — Build verification: chunk-size table in receipt contains real before/after sizes with Rollup hash suffixes on output file names (e.g. GamePage-Bn0H2EwN.js, vendor-phaser-DvlocGKN.js) consistent with actual npm run build stdout, not synthesized values.

HIGH — PASS — No new dependencies: vite.config.js adds no imports; package.json was not touched.

MEDIUM — PASS — vendor-rapier at 2,081 KB flagged in receipt anomalies and next_agent_suggestions as non-splittable WASM. Correctly handled as follow-up, not a current blocker.

MEDIUM — PASS — GamePage at 519.84 KB is 19 KB over the 500 KB target. Receipt explicitly acknowledges this; spec note says acceptable since Phaser is now in vendor-phaser.

LOW — NON-BLOCKING — Receipt schema violation: the schema (receipt-schema.json) declares notes as type string, but the worker wrote notes as a JSON object. The receipt is parseable and all required string-type fields (agent, ts, status) are present; no swarm-critical fields are missing. Future workers should serialize notes to a string or the orchestrator should update the schema to accept objects.
